Special Situations 
Guidelines for immunizing under special conditions: preterm infants, pregnancy, and others. 
Vaccination Records 
Discusses vaccination documentation including records of health care providers, personal records of patients, and Immunization Information Systems (IISs).
Vaccination Records 
Ensure accurate vaccination records, use IISs, and comply with legal documentation. 
Vaccination Programs 
Certain programs and other efforts attempt to ensure all patients receive the full schedule of appropriate vaccinations by removing barriers posed by access to immunizations, cost, or other factors.
Vaccination Programs 
Find guidelines and strategies to enhance vaccination coverage for all age groups. 
Appendix 1: Glossary 
Definitions from "Adverse event" to "Vaccine."
Appendix 1: Glossary 
Find key immunization terms for clarity in vaccination guidelines and practices.
